steps.title: Follow the evidence shift
steps.content: The passage begins with the general concern that introduced species can be harmful. It then gives evidence that hwameis spread seeds of endangered native plants on Oahu, showing a specific ecological benefit.

steps.title: Avoid overstating the claim
steps.content: A requires evidence of both positive and negative effects, but only a benefit is shown. B invents earlier damage by non-native birds. D discusses fruit preference, which is not the point. The conclusion should say some non-native birds provide an important benefit, not that all such birds do. The answer is C.
